headline: A Look At BXP (BXP) Valuation After New San Francisco Leasing Momentum
summary: BXP (BXP) has just secured more than 200,000 square feet of new leases at its 680 Folsom and 50 Hawthorne properties in San Francisco, pushing occupancy at these assets to high levels. See our latest analysis for BXP. These San Francisco lease wins come as BXP’s share price sits at US$58.91, with a 1-month share price return of 13.11% and a 3-year total shareholder return of 33.91%. This suggests improving short term momentum on top of longer term gains despite weaker recent quarters. If this...
